title: Ultimate Manhunt+
description: Dream-style Manhunt that survives restarts and runs in its own world.
body:
# ⚡ Ultimate Manhunt+

**Ultimate Manhunt+** brings the classic *Dream-style Manhunt* experience to your Minecraft server — with extra features, modern mechanics, and persistence. Whether you’re running a public event or just playing with friends, this plugin makes the chase more exciting, fair, and reliable.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🎯 **Multiple Speedrunners**
  Add one or more speedrunners — hunters’ compasses will always point to the **nearest runner**.

* 🧭 **Smart Hunter Compass**
  Hunters get a special compass that updates automatically and can be freely moved inside their inventory (but not dropped).

* ❄️ **Preparation Phase**
  Hunters are frozen at the start, giving speedrunners a head start before the chase begins.

* 🌍 **Automatic World Creation**
  Every match runs in its own dedicated world. Hunters and speedrunners are teleported there when the game starts.
  After the match ends, the world is **deleted automatically**, keeping your server clean.

* 🔄 **Persistent Game State**
  The game continues even if the server restarts or players leave. Roles and progress are saved and restored automatically.

* ⚔️ **Victory Conditions**

  * Hunters win when they kill all speedrunners.
  * Speedrunners win if they defeat the Ender Dragon.
  * Clear announcements and titles show when the game ends.

* 🎮 **Easy-to-use GUI**
  No complicated commands needed. Use the simple menu to:

  * Add/remove hunters and speedrunners
  * Start or stop the game
  * Manage roles with player heads

* 🧹 **Inventory Reset**
  All participants start fresh — inventories are cleared when the match begins.

---

## 📖 Commands

* `/manhunt gui` → Open the control menu
* `/manhunt start` → Start the game with a prep countdown
* `/manhunt stop` → End the game and reset everything
* `/manhunt add <hunter|speedrunner> <player>` → Assign roles
* `/manhunt remove <player>` → Remove a player from roles

---

## 🏷️ Tags

Adventure · Minigame · Game Mechanics · World Generation

---

## 🚀 Why choose Ultimate Manhunt+?

Unlike simple plugins, **Ultimate Manhunt+** was built for stability:

* It won’t break if players disconnect.
* It survives server restarts.
* It cleans up worlds automatically.
* It gives you smooth, event-ready gameplay every time.

---

⚡ **Bring the thrill of Manhunt to your server — reliable, persistent, and fun!**
